Command.Name: SSLA
Command.Title: SirenSetting Limit Adjuster.
Command.Description:
As of update **v3788**, the public version of **SSLA** is known to cause issues. We do not know when or if this will be updated. 

There is currently another developer testing an [updated version](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1446297751313711154/1505524993943933072/SSLA.zip?ex=6a1eb769&is=6a1d65e9&hm=13bc89c1b565e6811a1b677c4766df8ebb5c909e6f1f00a01d5adc433d5baa3e&).

 As always, **we are not responsible for files that aren't affiliated with us.** You can view the **Virus Total** scan [here](https://www.virustotal.com/gui/file/e73e59ac0e090556ec60cbf7712c806304fd760ba4ceba48cee738db70ed8e21?nocache=1)
